revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-1-090

Alternative term: Active redundancy

Redundancy in which the different means work together to perform the task, one of the means being capable of producing the results alone if the other fails.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Parallel redundancy}}
